title: Welcome to My Website!
text:
What you’ll find while you’re here I’m currently a graduate student at Boston University, pursuing my master’s degree in Applied Business Analytics. As you make your way through my website, you’ll learn more about my educational and professional background.
{width-“75%” fig-align=“center”}

title: About
text:
About this site
I am currently pursuing a Master of Science in Applied Business Analytics to strengthen my data-driven decision making skills. By acquirung my Bachelor’s degree in chemical engineering, I entered with a strong foundation in fluid mechanics, process kinetics, thermodynamics, and air pollution control. My goal is to use these degrees as a bridge between business development and the engineering mindset to pursue my interest in process improvement and optimization.

title: Contact
text:
I am currently based in the Boston, MA area. For inquiries, please reach out through one of the following email adresses
Personal: keilyperla36@gmail.com Academic: keiperla@bu.edu
